# Dubai Prod

> Dubai Prod is a full-service PR and digital marketing agency headquartered in Dubai, UAE. Founded in 2023, the agency has partnered with over 249 brands across the UAE and MENA region. Services span PR and media relations, social media management, SEO, video production, web development, branding, paid advertising, AI-powered marketing automation, and CGI/3D production.

## Company Info

- Name: Dubai Prod
- Type: PR & Digital Marketing Agency
- Location: DAMAC Executive Heights, Smart Creation, 19th Floor, Dubai, UAE
- Founded: 2023
- Brands Served: 249+
- Website: https://www.dubaiprod.com
- Phone: +971 54 333 3587
- Email: info@dubaiprod.com

## Services

- [PR & Media Relations](https://www.dubaiprod.com/pr-media.html): Press releases, journalist outreach, crisis communications, event PR, media training across UAE and GCC publications.
- [Social Media Management](https://www.dubaiprod.com/social-media.html): Strategy, content creation, community management, influencer partnerships, paid social campaigns across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, and X.
- [SEO & Digital Growth](https://www.dubaiprod.com/seo.html): Technical audits, on-page optimization, local SEO, content strategy, link building, Google Business Profile management for Dubai and UAE markets.
- [Video Production](https://www.dubaiprod.com/video-production-dubai.html): Commercial video, social media content, corporate films, product photography, food photography, and motion graphics.
- [Web Development](https://www.dubaiprod.com/web-development.html): Custom websites, e-commerce, landing pages, UI/UX design, performance optimization, and CMS development.
- [Branding & Identity](https://www.dubaiprod.com/branding-agency-dubai.html): Brand strategy, visual identity, logo design, brand guidelines, packaging design, and brand positioning.
- [Paid Advertising](https://www.dubaiprod.com/ads.html): Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, programmatic display, and retargeting campaigns.
- [AI Marketing Automation](https://www.dubaiprod.com/ai-marketing-automation-dubai.html): AI-powered content generation, predictive analytics, automated reporting, intelligent audience segmentation, and campaign optimization.
- [CGI & 3D Production](https://www.dubaiprod.com/cgi-3d.html): 3D product visualization, architectural renders, CGI animation, augmented reality assets, and virtual production.
- [GEO & AI Search Optimization](https://www.dubaiprod.com/geo-optimization-dubai.html): Generative Engine Optimization to get brands found and recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and AI search engines. Includes llms.txt creation, AI crawler optimization, Bing indexing, schema markup, and AI-friendly content strategy.

## Industries Served

Hospitality, real estate, technology, retail, healthcare, food & beverage, professional services, startups, and enterprise organizations across the UAE and GCC.

## Key Results

- First-page Google rankings achieved within 90 days for competitive Dubai-market keywords
- 50M+ social media impressions generated for hospitality and F&B brands
- Media placements in Gulf News, Khaleej Times, and Arabian Business
- Average 3.2x return on ad spend across paid advertising campaigns
- 40% reduction in campaign management time using AI-powered workflows
- 28% improvement in ROAS with AI-driven optimization

- [Digital Marketing in Dubai: Complete Guide](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-dubai.html): Comprehensive guide to digital marketing strategies for the Dubai and UAE market.
- [AI Marketing Automation](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-ai-marketing-automation.html): How AI is transforming marketing operations for UAE businesses.

- [Crisis PR Management](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-crisis-pr.html): Crisis communications strategies and PR management for brands in Dubai.
- [Luxury Brand Identity](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-luxury-brand-identity.html): Building and maintaining luxury brand identity in the competitive Dubai market.
- [Social Media Campaign Strategy](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-social-media-campaign.html): Creating high-performing social media campaigns for UAE audiences.
- [Influencer Marketing in Dubai](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-influencer-marketing-dubai.html): Complete brand guide to influencer marketing in Dubai for 2026, including vetting, platform selection, and ROI measurement.
- [Restaurant Marketing in Dubai](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-restaurant-marketing-dubai.html): 10 strategies that actually work for F&B marketing in Dubai in 2026.
- [Startup Marketing in Dubai](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-startup-marketing-dubai.html): A founder's guide to growth marketing in Dubai on a startup budget.
- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Guide](https://www.dubaiprod.com/blog-geo-optimization.html): Complete guide to getting your UAE business found and recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI search engines in 2026.
